plurals.name: plurals0006
plurals.item: "%d members can't be added to the community. You can invite them privately to join this group through its invite link."
"This member can't be added to the community. You can invite them privately to join this group through its invite link."

plurals.name: plurals000a
plurals.item: "Couldn't send the admin invites. Please try again."
"Couldn't send the admin invite. Please try again."

plurals.name: plurals000c
plurals.item: " Couldn't send invite to %1$s and %2$s others"
" Couldn't send invite to %1$s and %2$s other"

plurals.name: plurals0016
plurals.item: Your audience includes %1$d unique recipients from the labels you selected.
Your audience includes %1$d unique recipient from the labels you selected.

plurals.name: plurals0017
plurals.item: Your audience includes %1$d unique recipients from the lists you selected.
Your audience includes %1$d unique recipient from the lists you selected.

plurals.name: plurals0023
plurals.item: Broadcast or create a new group with a maximum of %1$d people at a time.
Broadcast or create a new group with a maximum of %1$d person at a time.

plurals.name: plurals0024
plurals.item: Broadcast to a maximum of %1$d people at a time.
Broadcast to a maximum of %1$d person at a time.

plurals.name: plurals0037
plurals.item: You can only pin up to %1$d chats
You can only pin up to %1$d chat

plurals.name: plurals0038
plurals.item: You can only pin up to %1$d channels

plurals.name: plurals003b
plurals.item: Your new number will be shared with your groups and %d contacts.
Your new number will be shared with your groups and %d contact.

plurals.name: plurals003c
plurals.item: I want to share updates from the %1$s channel with you on WhatsApp! Download at %2$s
I want to share an update from the %1$s channel with you on WhatsApp! Download at %2$s

plurals.name: plurals0040
plurals.item: Sending replies is unavailable when the group has over %d members.
Sending replies is unavailable when the group has over %d member.

plurals.name: plurals0046
plurals.item: They will be added to the community and its announcement group.
They will be added to the community and its announcement group.

plurals.name: plurals0047
plurals.item: Add %d people to group and community?
Add %d person to group and community?

plurals.name: plurals0048
plurals.item: "Couldn't add %s to the community announcement group, so they were not added to the community. You can invite them privately to join this group."
"Couldn't add %s to the community announcement group, so they were not added to the community. You can invite them privately to join this group."

plurals.name: plurals0049
plurals.item:
"Couldn't add %1s to the community announcement group, so they were not added to the community. Message history will not be shared.
You can invite them privately to join this group."

"Couldn't add %1s to the community announcement group, so they were not added to the community. Message history will not be shared.
You can invite them privately to join this group."

plurals.name: plurals004c
plurals.item: Please download all the files first.

plurals.name: plurals004e
plurals.item: %s is no longer a community admin

plurals.name: plurals004f
plurals.item: You, %s are no longer community admins
You and %s are no longer community admins

plurals.name: plurals0051
plurals.item: You and %s are now community admins

plurals.name: plurals0053
plurals.item: If approved by community admins, people in these groups will be added to the community and the announcement group, and can join other community groups. You can review group permissions:
If approved by community admins, people in this group will be added to the community and the announcement group, and can join other community groups. You can review group permissions:

plurals.name: plurals0055
plurals.item: Only %1$d of %2$d pending group suggestions will be approved because this community is full.
Only %1$d of %2$d pending group suggestions will be approved because this community is full.

plurals.name: plurals006f
plurals.item: "The description you entered is too long. Enter a description that's %d characters or less and try again."
"The description you entered is too long. Enter a description that's %d character or less and try again."

plurals.name: plurals0072
plurals.item: All messages in these chats will be deleted. This cannot be undone.
All messages in this chat will be deleted. This cannot be undone.

plurals.name: plurals0073
plurals.item: You can add up to %1$d people to Favorites.
You can add up to %1$d person to Favorites.

plurals.name: plurals0075
plurals.item: You applied a %1$s message timer to %2$d of your existing chats.
You applied a %1$s message timer to %2$d of your existing chats.

plurals.name: plurals0080
plurals.item: Message privately with your %d WhatsApp contacts, no matter what device they use.
Message privately with your WhatsApp contacts, no matter what device they use.

plurals.name: plurals0081
plurals.item: Chat with your %d WhatsApp contacts, or invite a friend to WhatsApp.
WhatsApp is better with friends. Use the button below to invite your contacts.

plurals.name: plurals0083
plurals.item: Use an automatically created %d-digit key to protect your backup.
Use an automatically created %d-digit key to protect your backup.

plurals.name: plurals0084
plurals.item: If you move to a new device, you can use your %d-digit encryption key to restore your chats.
If you move to a new device, you can use your %d-digit encryption key to restore your chats.

plurals.name: plurals0085
plurals.item: Your backup is protected with a %d-digit encryption-key
Your backup is protected with a %d-digit encryption-key

plurals.name: plurals0087
plurals.item: Did you save your full %d-digit encryption key?
Did you save your full %d-digit encryption key?

plurals.name: plurals0089
plurals.item: Must contain at least %1$d characters and 1 letter
Must contain at least %1$d character and 1 letter

plurals.name: plurals008c
plurals.item: Your account is not associated with a password. Please enter your %d-digit encryption key instead.
Your account is not associated with a password. Please enter your %d-digit encryption key instead.

plurals.name: plurals008d
plurals.item: To restore your end-to-end encrypted backup, enter your %d-digit encryption key.
To restore your end-to-end encrypted backup, enter your %d-digit encryption key.

plurals.name: plurals008e
plurals.item: You chose to protect your backup with a %d-digit encryption key. If you would rather protect it with a password, you can create one.
You chose to protect your backup with a %d-digit encryption key. If you would rather protect it with a password, you can create one.

plurals.name: plurals0090
plurals.item: Enter the %d-digit key you use to protect your end-to-end encrypted backup.
Enter the %d-digit key you use to protect your end-to-end encrypted backup.

plurals.name: plurals0091
plurals.item: To begin, enter your %d-digit encryption key.
To begin, enter your %d-digit encryption key.

plurals.name: plurals0092
plurals.item: To turn off end-to-end encryption for your backup, enter your %d-digit encryption key.
To turn off end-to-end encryption for your backup, enter your %d-digit encryption key.

plurals.name: plurals0097
plurals.item: This message will disappear from the chat after %d days.
This message will disappear from the chat after %d day.

plurals.name: plurals0098
plurals.item: This message will disappear from the chat after %d hours.
This message will disappear from the chat after %d hour.

plurals.name: plurals0099
plurals.item: This message will disappear from the chat after %d minutes.
This message will disappear from the chat after %d minute.

plurals.name: plurals009a
plurals.item: This message will disappear from the chat after %d seconds.
This message will disappear from the chat after %d second.

plurals.name: plurals009f
plurals.item: "You couldn't add %d members because they left the group recently. Try again later."
"You couldn't add %d member because they left the group recently. Try again later."

plurals.name: plurals00a0
plurals.item: This photo is too small. Please select a photo with height and width of at least %d pixels.
This photo is too small. Please select a photo with height and width of at least %d pixel.

plurals.name: plurals00a8
plurals.item: "Exit group and community? You have %1$d unsent messages in this chat."
"Exit group and community? You have %1$d unsent message in this chat."

plurals.name: plurals00a9
plurals.item: "Exit \"%1$s\" group? You have %2$d unsent messages in this chat."
"Exit \"%1$s\" group? You have %2$d unsent message in this chat."

plurals.name: plurals00ad
plurals.item: %d members cannot be added because the community is full.
Member cannot be added because the community is full.

plurals.name: plurals00ae
plurals.item: %d members cannot be added to the community.
Member cannot be added to the community.

plurals.name: plurals00af
plurals.item: You reached the maximum of %1$d admins for this community
You reached the maximum of %1$d admin for this community

plurals.name: plurals00b0
plurals.item: %1$d groups cannot be added because the community is full
%1$d group cannot be added because the community is full

plurals.name: plurals00b7
plurals.item: This status update will be sent to your contacts excluding %d.
This status update will be sent to your contacts excluding %d.

plurals.name: plurals00b8
plurals.item: This status update will be sent to %d contacts.
This status update will be sent to %d contact.

plurals.name: plurals00c0
plurals.item:
"Your report will be ready in about %1$d days. You'll have a few weeks to download your report after it's available.
Your request will be canceled if you make changes to your account such as changing your number or deleting your account."

"Your report will be ready in about %1$d day. You'll have a few weeks to download your report after it's available.
Your request will be canceled if you make changes to your account such as changing your number or deleting your account."

plurals.name: plurals00c5
plurals.item: "Couldn't add %s. You can invite them privately to join this group."
"Couldn't add %s. You can invite them privately to join this group."

plurals.name: plurals00c6
plurals.item:
"Couldn't add %1s. Message history will not be shared.
You can invite them privately to join this group."

"Couldn't add %1s. Message history will not be shared.
You can invite them privately to join this group."

plurals.name: plurals00c9
plurals.item: A member joined from the community

plurals.name: plurals00cb
plurals.item: Maximum group capacity of %1$d members reached.
Maximum group capacity of %1$d member reached.

plurals.name: plurals00d0
plurals.item: You are sending message history to the selected members.
You are sending message history to the selected member.

plurals.name: plurals00d2
plurals.item: Send the last message to the selected members.
Send the last message to the selected member.

plurals.name: plurals00d3
plurals.item: Send the last %1$d messages to the selected members.
Send the last %1$d messages to the selected members.

plurals.name: plurals00d4
plurals.item: Send the last %1$d messages to the selected member.
Send the last %1$d messages to the selected member.

plurals.name: plurals00d5
plurals.item: Send the last %1$d messages to the selected members.
Send the last message to the selected members.

plurals.name: plurals00d6
plurals.item: Send the last %1$d messages to the selected member.
Send the last message to the selected member.

plurals.name: plurals00db
plurals.item: "%d people not shown because they aren't in your contacts"
"%d person not shown because they aren't in your contacts"

plurals.name: plurals00dc
plurals.item: Only %1$1d of %2$2d pending requests will be approved because the group has reached capacity.
Only %1$1d of %2$2d pending request will be approved because the group has reached capacity.

plurals.name: plurals00dd
plurals.item: "Group name can't be more than %1$d characters."
"Group name can't be more than %1$d character."

plurals.name: plurals00e0
plurals.item: You and %s are no longer admins

plurals.name: plurals00e8
plurals.item: This group has over %1$d members so now only admins can edit the group settings.
This group has over %1$d member so now only admins can edit the group settings.

plurals.name: plurals00ea
plurals.item: You can select up to %1$d groups
You can only select one group

plurals.name: plurals00ef
plurals.item: Found %1$d contact cards for this number. Add to your contacts?
Found %1$d contact card for this number. Add to your contacts?

plurals.name: plurals00f1
plurals.item: This status will be shared with your contacts excluding %d.
This status will be shared with your contacts excluding %d.

plurals.name: plurals00f2
plurals.item: This status will be shared with %d contacts.
This status will be shared with %d contact.

plurals.name: plurals00fc
plurals.item: Choose up to %d photos for your layout.
Choose up to %d photo for your layout.

plurals.name: plurals0103
plurals.item: You can only add %1$d groups when creating a community. You can add more after this community is created.
You can only add %1$d group when creating a community. You can add more after this community is created.

plurals.name: plurals0107
plurals.item: The people in these groups will be added to the community and its announcement group.
The people in this group will be added to the community and its announcement group.

plurals.name: plurals0117
plurals.item: "Can't send more than %d audio messages at a time"
"Can't send more than %d audio message at a time"

plurals.name: plurals011f
plurals.item: You have %d minutes to start and then finish editing a message.
You have %d minute to start and then finish editing a message.

plurals.name: plurals0134
plurals.item: "%1$s is needed on this device for transfer. Please clear out space by using WhatsApp's storage management tool."
"%1$s is needed on this device for transfer. Please clear out space by using WhatsApp's storage management tool."

plurals.name: plurals0135
plurals.item: Only %1$d of %2$d pending group suggestions will be approved because this community is full.
Only %1$d of %2$d pending group suggestions will be approved because this community is full.

plurals.name: plurals0139
plurals.item: You can only share with up to %1$d chats
You can only share with up to %1$d chat

plurals.name: plurals013e
plurals.item: At least %d contacts must be selected
At least %d contact must be selected

plurals.name: plurals0154
plurals.item:
"Your report will be ready in about %1$d days. You'll have a few weeks to download your report after it's available.
Your report will be canceled if you make changes to your account such as changing your number or deleting your account."

"Your report will be ready in about %1$d day. You'll have a few weeks to download your report after it's available.
Your report will be canceled if you make changes to your account such as changing your number or deleting your account."

plurals.name: plurals0162
plurals.item: You can only share to %1$d channels.
You can only share to %1$d channel.

plurals.name: plurals0172
plurals.item: You have several notifications about your payments account or activity.
You have one notification about your payments account or activity.

plurals.name: plurals0185
plurals.item: %1$s and %2$d more of your contacts are on WhatsApp
%1$s and %2$d other contact is on WhatsApp

plurals.name: plurals0186
plurals.item: %1$s, %2$s, %3$s and %4$d more of your contacts are on WhatsApp
%1$s, %2$s, %3$s and %4$d other contact is on WhatsApp

plurals.name: plurals0187
plurals.item: %1$s, %2$s and %3$d more of your contacts are on WhatsApp
%1$s, %2$s and %3$d other contact is on WhatsApp

plurals.name: plurals0189
plurals.item: "Couldn't add %s. You can invite them privately to join this community."
"Couldn't add %s. You can invite them privately to join this community."

plurals.name: plurals018a
plurals.item:
"Couldn't add %1s. Message history will not be shared.
You can invite them privately to join this community."

"Couldn't add %1s. Message history will not be shared.
You can invite them privately to join this community."

plurals.name: plurals018f
plurals.item: "%d members not displayed because they aren't in your contacts"
"%d member not displayed because they aren't in your contacts"

plurals.name: plurals0192
plurals.item: People who left or were removed in the last %d days. Learn more
People who left or were removed in the last %d day. Learn more

plurals.name: plurals0194
plurals.item: %d attempts left. You’ll need to set up payments again after too many incorrect attempts.
%d attempt left. You’ll need to set up payments again after too many incorrect attempts.

plurals.name: plurals0195
plurals.item: "You can't invite more than %1$d people to payments at a time."
"You can't invite more than %1$d person to payments at a time."

plurals.name: plurals0196
plurals.item: You can only send %d payment requests each day. Try again later.
You can only send %d payment request each day. Try again later.

plurals.name: plurals01b4
plurals.item: Delete your profile picture across %1$d profiles?
Delete your profile picture across %1$d profile?

plurals.name: plurals01b5
plurals.item: "The %s emojis aren't allowed in your name."
"The %s emoji isn't allowed in your name."

plurals.name: plurals01b6
plurals.item: Only %d of these items are currently available.
Only %d of these items is currently available.

plurals.name: plurals01b7
plurals.item: "You've sent %1$d broadcasts this month. You'll be able to send more on %2$s."
"You've sent %1$d broadcast this month. You'll be able to send more on %2$s."

plurals.name: plurals01b8
plurals.item:
"You've sent %1$d broadcasts this month. You'll be able to send more on %2$s.

If you're a business, you can get advanced messaging tools on the WhatsApp Business app."

"You've sent %1$d broadcast this month. You'll be able to send more on %2$s.

If you're a business, you can get advanced messaging tools on the WhatsApp Business app."

plurals.name: plurals01c2
plurals.item: Your code needs to be %d digits.
Your code needs to be %d digit.

plurals.name: plurals01c3
plurals.item: "Don't forget to join our community %1$s on WhatsApp! This invite is good for %2$d days. %3$s"
"Don't forget to join our community %1$s on WhatsApp! This invite is good for %2$d day. %3$s"

plurals.name: plurals01c4
plurals.item: "Don't forget to join our group chat %1$s on WhatsApp! This invite is good for %2$d days. %3$s"
"Don't forget to join our group chat %1$s on WhatsApp! This invite is good for %2$d day. %3$s"

plurals.name: plurals01c5
plurals.item: "Don't forget to join %1$s on WhatsApp! This invite expires in %2$d days. %3$s"
"Don't forget to join %1$s on WhatsApp! This invite expires in %2$d day. %3$s"

plurals.name: plurals01c6
plurals.item: "Don't forget to join our community on WhatsApp! This invite is good for %1$d days. %2$s"
"Don't forget to join our community on WhatsApp! This invite is good for %1$d day. %2$s"

plurals.name: plurals01c7
plurals.item: "Don't forget to join our community on WhatsApp! This invite expires in %1$d days. %2$s"
"Don't forget to join our community on WhatsApp! This invite expires in %1$d day. %2$s"

plurals.name: plurals01c8
plurals.item: "Don't forget to join our community on WhatsApp, the world's most popular messaging app! This invite expires in %1$d days. %2$s"
"Don't forget to join our community on WhatsApp, the world's most popular messaging app! This invite expires in %1$d day. %2$s"

plurals.name: plurals01c9
plurals.item: "Don't forget to join our group chat on WhatsApp! This invite is good for %1$d days. %2$s"
"Don't forget to join our group chat on WhatsApp! This invite is good for %1$d day. %2$s"

plurals.name: plurals01ca
plurals.item: "Don't forget to join our group on WhatsApp! This invite expires in %1$d days. %2$s"
"Don't forget to join our group on WhatsApp! This invite expires in %1$d day. %2$s"

plurals.name: plurals01cb
plurals.item: "Don't forget to join our group chat on WhatsApp, the world's most popular messaging app! This invite expires in %1$d days. %2$s"
"Don't forget to join our group chat on WhatsApp, the world's most popular messaging app! This invite expires in %1$d day. %2$s"

plurals.name: plurals01cd
plurals.item: %1$s tried to reach you %2$d days ago
%1$s tried to reach you %2$d day ago

plurals.name: plurals01ce
plurals.item: %1$s tried to reach you %2$d hours ago
%1$s tried to reach you %2$d hour ago

plurals.name: plurals01d0
plurals.item: %1$s and %2$s others replied to your announcement message
%1$s and %2$s other replied to your announcement message

plurals.name: plurals01d1
plurals.item: %1$s and %2$s others replied to your announcement messages
%1$s and %2$s other replied to your announcement messages

plurals.name: plurals01d2
plurals.item: Sent for review by <font color=#%1$s>%2$d members</font>
Sent for review by <font color=#%1$s>%2$d member</font>

plurals.name: plurals01d3
plurals.item:
"The last %d messages from this group will be forwarded to WhatsApp, excluding any replies to announcements.
If you exit this group and delete the chat, messages will only be removed from this device and your devices on the newer versions of WhatsApp.
No one in this group will be notified."

"The last %d message from this group will be forwarded to WhatsApp, excluding any replies to announcements.
If you exit this group and delete the chat, messages will only be removed from this device and your devices on the newer versions of WhatsApp.
No one in this group will be notified."

plurals.name: plurals01d4
plurals.item: The last %d messages from this group will be forwarded to WhatsApp, excluding any replies to announcements. No one in this group will be notified.
The last %d message from this group will be forwarded to WhatsApp, excluding any replies to announcements. No one in this group will be notified.

plurals.name: plurals01d5
plurals.item: You can request a new code in %d hours
You can request a new code in %d hour

plurals.name: plurals01d6
plurals.item: People in these groups will be added to the community and the announcement group, and can join other community groups. You can review group permissions:
People in this group will be added to the community and the announcement group, and can join other community groups. You can review group permissions:

plurals.name: plurals01db
plurals.item: At least %1$d contacts must be selected.
At least %1$d contact must be selected.

plurals.name: plurals01dd
plurals.item: "Hey, join our community %1$s on WhatsApp! Here's an invite link — it's good for %2$d days. %3$s"
"Hey, join our community %1$s on WhatsApp! Here's an invite link — it's good for %2$d day. %3$s"

plurals.name: plurals01de
plurals.item: Documents need to have less than %d pages.
Documents need to have less than %d page.

plurals.name: plurals01df
plurals.item: "Hey, join our group chat %1$s on WhatsApp! Here's an invite link — it's good for %2$d days. %3$s"
"Hey, join our group chat %1$s on WhatsApp! Here's an invite link — it's good for %2$d day. %3$s"

plurals.name: plurals01e0
plurals.item: "Hey, join our community on WhatsApp! Here's an invite link — it's good for %1$d days. %2$s"
"Hey, join our community on WhatsApp! Here's an invite link — it's good for %1$d day. %2$s"

plurals.name: plurals01e1
plurals.item: "You're invited to join a community on WhatsApp! It's the world's most popular messaging app. This invite expires in %1$d days. %2$s"
"You're invited to join a community on WhatsApp! It's the world's most popular messaging app. This invite expires in %1$d day. %2$s"

plurals.name: plurals01e2
plurals.item: "Hey, join our group chat on WhatsApp! Here's an invite link — it's good for %1$d days. %2$s"
"Hey, join our group chat on WhatsApp! Here's an invite link — it's good for %1$d day. %2$s"

plurals.name: plurals01e3
plurals.item: "You're invited to join a group chat on WhatsApp! It's the world's most popular messaging app. This invite expires in %1$d days. %2$s"
"You're invited to join a group chat on WhatsApp! It's the world's most popular messaging app. This invite expires in %1$d day. %2$s"

plurals.name: plurals01e7
plurals.item: %1$d videos you selected will be trimmed to %2$d MB in size.
A video you selected will be trimmed to %2$d MB in size.

plurals.name: plurals0209
plurals.item: This version of WhatsApp needs to be updated in %d days. Update to the latest version?
This version of WhatsApp needs to be updated in %d day. Update to the latest version?

plurals.name: plurals020a
plurals.item: Updates will be kept on your device for up to %d days and can be used to create ads on Facebook & Instagram. Only you can see your archived updates.
Updates will be kept on your device for up to %d day and can be used to create ads on Facebook & Instagram. Only you can see your archived updates.

plurals.name: plurals0210
plurals.item: You can select groups with up to %d members.
You can select groups with up to %d member.

plurals.name: plurals0211
plurals.item: You can select up to %d groups.
You can select up to %d group.

plurals.name: plurals021e
plurals.item: Share status with a maximum of %1$d people at a time.
Share status with a maximum of %1$d person at a time.

plurals.name: plurals0225
plurals.item: This will remove the whole sticker pack, including %d stickers.
This will remove the whole sticker pack, including %d sticker.

plurals.name: plurals0228
plurals.item: "%d channels not displayed because they're taking up a small amount of storage"
%d channel not displayed because it is taking up a small amount of storage

plurals.name: plurals0229
plurals.item: "%d chats not displayed because they're taking up a small amount of storage"
%d chat not displayed because it is taking up a small amount of storage

plurals.name: plurals022f
plurals.item: If the groups are approved by an admin, the people in these groups will be added to the community and its announcement group.
If the group is approved by an admin, the people in this group will be added to the community and its announcement group.

plurals.name: plurals0230
plurals.item: Only %1$d of %2$d group suggestions could be sent for admin approval.
Only %1$d of %2$d group suggestions could be sent for admin approval.

plurals.name: plurals0241
plurals.item: A group was added. View group

plurals.name: plurals0243
plurals.item: You added a group. View group

plurals.name: plurals024b
plurals.item: New messages will disappear from this chat after %d days.
New messages will disappear from this chat after %d day.

plurals.name: plurals024c
plurals.item: New messages will disappear from this chat after %d hours.
New messages will disappear from this chat after %d hour.

plurals.name: plurals024d
plurals.item: New messages will disappear from this chat after %d minutes.
New messages will disappear from this chat after %d minute.

plurals.name: plurals024e
plurals.item: New messages will disappear from this chat after %d seconds.
New messages will disappear from this chat after %d second.

plurals.name: plurals0254
plurals.item: Text sent to My Status will be trimmed to the first %d characters.
Text sent to My Status will be trimmed to the first %d character.

plurals.name: plurals0255
plurals.item: Text shared to My Status will be trimmed to the first %d characters.
Text shared to My Status will be trimmed to the first %d character.

plurals.name: plurals025c
plurals.item: You can only share with up to %1$d chats.
You can only share with %1$d chat.

plurals.name: plurals025e
plurals.item: You have %1$s to respond to this request
You have %1$s to respond to this request

plurals.name: plurals025f
plurals.item: %1$s has %2$s to respond to your request
%1$s has %2$s to respond to your request

plurals.name: plurals0261
plurals.item: You have %1$s to accept this payment
You have %1$s to accept this payment

plurals.name: plurals0264
plurals.item: Are you sure you want to unfollow %s channels?
Are you sure you want to unfollow %s channel?

plurals.name: plurals0265
plurals.item: Are you sure you want to unfollow %s channels? Stars will be removed from updates in these channels.
Are you sure you want to unfollow %s channel? Stars will be removed from updates in this channel.

plurals.name: plurals0269
plurals.item: You have %1$d unread messages from %2$s, %3$s and more.
You have %1$d unread message from %2$s, %3$s and more.

plurals.name: plurals026b
plurals.item: You have %1$d unread messages from %2$s and %3$s.
You have %1$d unread message from %2$s and %3$s.

plurals.name: plurals0273
plurals.item: You have %1$d unsent messages in selection.
You have %1$d unsent message in selection.

plurals.name: plurals0274
plurals.item: "Exit group: \"%1$s\"? You have %2$d unsent messages in this chat"
"Exit group: \"%1$s\"? You have %2$d unsent message in this chat"

plurals.name: plurals0275
plurals.item: You have %1$s to approve this request
You have %1$s to approve this request

plurals.name: plurals0276
plurals.item: Verified merchant • Send up to ₹%1$d Lakhs
Verified merchant • Send up to ₹%1$d Lakh

plurals.name: plurals027a
plurals.item: Ongoing video call - Waiting for others… This call will end in %d minutes if no one joins.
Ongoing video call - Waiting for others… This call will end in %d minute if no one joins.

plurals.name: plurals027f
plurals.item: Videos sent to My Status will be trimmed to the first %d seconds.
Videos sent to My Status will be trimmed to the first %d second.

plurals.name: plurals0280
plurals.item: Videos shared to My status will be trimmed to the first %d seconds.
Videos shared to My status will be trimmed to the first %d second.

plurals.name: plurals0281
plurals.item: Video will be trimmed to the first %d seconds.
Video will be trimmed to the first %d second.

plurals.name: plurals0286
plurals.item: "You're the only one here. Voice chat ending in %1d seconds."
"You're the only one here. Voice chat ending in %1d second."

plurals.name: plurals0287
plurals.item: Ongoing voice chat - Waiting for others… This voice chat will end in %d minutes if no one joins.
Ongoing voice chat - Waiting for others… This voice chat will end in %d minute if no one joins.

plurals.name: plurals0288
plurals.item: Time extended by %1d minutes. Waiting for people to join.
Time extended by %1d minute. Waiting for people to join.

plurals.name: plurals0289
plurals.item: Ongoing voice call - Waiting for others… This call will end in %d minutes if no one joins.
Ongoing voice call - Waiting for others… This call will end in %d minute if no one joins.

plurals.name: plurals028a
plurals.item: You can only add %1$d people to this call.
You can only add %1$d person to this call.

plurals.name: plurals028e
plurals.item: Everyone in the call needs the latest version of WhatsApp for calls with %d people
Everyone in the call needs the latest version of WhatsApp for calls with %d person

plurals.name: plurals028f
plurals.item:
"Several people are using an old version of WhatsApp.
To start calls with %d people, everyone in the call needs the latest version of WhatsApp."

"Several people are using an old version of WhatsApp.
To start calls with %d person, everyone in the call needs the latest version of WhatsApp."

plurals.name: plurals0290
plurals.item:
"%1$s is using an old version of WhatsApp.
To start calls with %2$d people, everyone in the call needs the latest version of WhatsApp."

"%1$s is using an old version of WhatsApp.
To start calls with %2$d person, everyone in the call needs the latest version of WhatsApp."

plurals.name: plurals0291
plurals.item: %s are unable to join WhatsApp group calls at this time.
%s is unable to join WhatsApp group calls at this time.

plurals.name: plurals0292
plurals.item: "Couldn't place call. WhatsApp only supports a maximum of %d people in a group call"
"Couldn't place call. WhatsApp only supports a maximum of %d person in a group call"

plurals.name: plurals0296
plurals.item: %s are unable to receive WhatsApp calls at this time.
%s is unable to receive WhatsApp calls at this time.

plurals.name: plurals029b
plurals.item: You created broadcast list \"%1$s\" with %2$d recipients
You created broadcast list \"%1$s\" with %2$d recipient

plurals.name: plurals029c
plurals.item: You created a broadcast list with %d recipients
You created a broadcast list with %d recipient

plurals.name: plurals02a0
plurals.item: You can only change this setting once every %d hours.
You can only change this setting once every %d hour.

plurals.name: plurals02a1
plurals.item: Failed to leave %d groups. Try again.
Failed to leave %d group. Try again.
